title: Notifications  - Device updating OFF
scenario: No firmware update notification appears when Device Software Update notifications are disabled in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 2. Go to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Set 'Device Software Update' notifications to OFF.
4. Pair a Poly Bluetooth audio device with the mobile device.
5. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the paired device.
6. Press the Home button or switch to another app to put the Poly Studio Mobile app in the background.
7. Observe the notification area (status bar / notification shade) on the mobile device.
expected: No notification is displayed in the notification area when the device firmware update begins while the app is in the background.
